titleStmt.title: SII 29.54: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 54. (A.R. No. 70 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: On another pillar at the same place Museum Acc. No. 88.

It states that when Chālukya Tribhuvanamalladēva was ruling over the empire from his capital Kalyāṇa, mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kandūra Toṅḍaya-Chōḍa mahārāja made a gift of the village Rācheṟuvu situated in Koḍada-12, for worship and offerings to god Vishṇudēva free of all imposts. The record describes the donor with a string of birudas and states that he was administering over Koḷḷipāka-7000.
The record is dated in Chālukya Vikrama year 16, Prajāpati, [Śaka 1013], uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti. It corresponds to 1091 A.D., December 25, [Thursday].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samasta bhuva
nāśraya śrī
pṛthvīvallabha mahā
rājādhi rāja para
mēśvara parama bhaṭṭā
rakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīma
tṛtribhuvanamalla
dēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivṛddhi
pravarddhamāna mācaṁdrā
rkka tāraṁbaraṁ kalyāṇa
da nelavīḍinoḷsukha
saṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyyuttumire tatpāda
padmōpajīvi

samadhigata paṁca mahā sa(śa)bda
mahāmaṇḍaḷēsva(śva)raṁ vīramāhē
śvaraṁ kōḍūrppuravarēśvaraṁ
sūryyavaṁsō(śō)dbhava ku
ḷatiḷakaṁ kāsya(śya)pa gōtraṁ
karikālānvaya nāmādi
samasta prasa(śa)sti sahitaṁ
śrī manmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
kandūra toṁḍaya cōḍa
mahārājaṁ koḷḷipāke
Ercchāsiramumaṁ sukhadi
nāḷuttamiṟdu śrī
maccāḷukya vikrama kā
lada hadināṟaneya prajā
pati saṁvatsaraduttarāya
ṇa saṁkrānti parvva nimitta
diṁ koḍada panneraḍaṟa ba
ḷiya rācēṟuvaṁ śrī
viṣṇudēvargge dhārā
pūrvvakaṁ sarvvanama
syavāgi dēvaraṁgabhōga
kkaṁ raṁgabhōgakkaṁ koṭṭar .
ṇi yasapuṇyaNote-Lines 40-44 are There is no difference in script except the size.
mēkaḥ kōdanavina dharma dvādaśagrā
maṇi sadayā
maṇḍaḷēśa vvīra mahēsa (mmu)dadi śrī
tābillu viṣṇuvesaḥ . śrī śrī Note-Lines 40-44 are written in small letters and look like an addition made just There is no difference in script except the size.
Digital edition of SII 29.54 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
